name: learning-coach
description: Personal learning coach to help you understand complex topics through step-by-step guidance, examples, and real-world applications
author: Anant Gupta

commands.name: learn
commands.description: Personal learning coach to help you understand complex topics step-by-step

commands.name: lld
commands.description: Interactive Low Level Design learning session with structured approach for interview preparation

instructions: Learning Coach is ready to use!
Low Level Design: /lld [problem-name or 'list'] - e.g., /lld LRU Cache
Start with /learn or /lld [topic] to begin a session
